info.title: LlmSemverBump
info.description: AI-powered semantic versioning tool. Analyzes git commits and diffs using Claude Code to determine the correct semver bump (major/minor/patch) for your NuGet packages.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: AI-powered semantic version bumping. Analyzes git history with Claude Code CLI to determine the correct semver bump.

options.name: --tag
options.description: Override the base tag (default: latest tag via git describe)

options.name: --csproj
options.description: Path to a specific .csproj to update (default: all .csproj files with <Version>)

options.name: --apply
options.description: Apply the version bump to .csproj files (default: dry run) [default: False]

options.name: --git-tag
options.description: Create a git tag with the new version after applying [default: False]

options.name: --model
options.description: Claude model to use (passed to claude CLI --model)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format: text, json, or version-only [default: text]
